# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

format_version: "1.1"

services:
  - name: microservice1
    url: http://microservice1.example.com
    routes:
      - paths:
          - /path1
        methods:
          - GET
        strip_path: false
    upstream_url: http://microservice1.example.com
    hash_on: none
    hash_fallback: none
    hash_on_cookie:
      name: ""
      path: "/"
      samesite: ""

  - name: microservice2
    url: http://microservice2.example.com
    routes:
      - paths:
          - /path2
        methods:
          - POST
        strip_path: false
    upstream_url: http://microservice2.example.com
    hash_on: none
    hash_fallback: none
    hash_on_cookie:
      name: ""
      path: "/"
      samesite: ""
